content.situation: 在结束一次工作咨询后，你向顾问表达感谢并准备告别
content.speakerText: Thanks for walking me through all the details today.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你今天为我详细讲解所有细节。

blanks.answer: Thank you so much for your time and
options: Thank you so much for your time and
I'm happy you helped me and
I'll see you next time and

content.hint: 表达感谢时，常用结构是 'Thank you so much for your time and...' 来体现礼貌和专业
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌道别中的感谢表达结构

content.situation: 会议结束后，你向同事道别并感谢对方的建议
content.speakerText: I really found your suggestions helpful.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感谢你的建议，很有帮助。
content.hint: 在道别时表达再次感谢，常用短语是 'Thanks again'，简洁且得体

content.situation: 结束一次面试后，你向面试官礼貌告别并表达感激
content.speakerText: We really enjoyed hearing your perspective.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们很欣赏你分享的见解。
content.responseTemplate: ___ for the opportunity and your time.
content.hint: 正式场合道别时，最标准的感谢开头是 'Thank you'，后面接具体感谢内容
content.knowledgePoint: 正式场合的感谢开场句式
